title: EPA v. QUEENS FARM DAIRY
text:
EPA Enforcement Case 02-1977-0003: QUEENS FARM DAIRY
Type: Civil Judicial Action
Status: Closed
Outcome: Litigated With Penalty
Lead Agency: EPA

Penalties and Costs:
Federal Penalty: $49,500

Laws and Sections Violated:
  CWA: 309: Violation of Existing AO (Administrative Compliance Order)

Defendants:
  QUEENS FARM DAIRY

Facilities:
  QUEENS DAIRY PRODUCTS, INC, EISENHOWER RD, PIERREPONT MANOR, NY

Case Milestones:
  01/01/1977: Referred To Headquarters
  05/11/1977: Referred To Dept Of Justice
  05/11/1977: Referred TO U.S. Attorney
  08/01/1977: Complaint Filed With Court
  09/23/1980: Enforcement Action Closed
  09/23/1980: Concluded
  09/23/1980: Final Order Entered
  09/23/1980: Final Order Lodged

Pollutants:
  NONE

Enforcement Conclusion #1: Consent Decree or Court Order Resolving a Civil Judicial Action
  Name: QUEENS FARM DAIRY
  Settlement Entered: 09/23/1980
  Federal Penalty: $49,500
